name: codex-plugin-publisher
description: Guidance for sanitizing local Codex plugins and publishing them into a Git-backed marketplace.

interface.shortDescription: Publish plugins to a Git marketplace.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex sanitize locally built plugins, add them to a Git-backed marketplace repository, validate marketplace metadata, and push the result for reuse across Codex environments.
defaultPrompt: Publish this local plugin to the marketplace.
Sanitize and add a plugin to codex-stuff.
